reason: All success criteria met: script executes without errors, --help displays usage, output JSON validates against required schema, Pulse builds correctly show drop counts (e.g., prompt-to-skill: 3 complete, 3 running, 1 pending, 42% progress), legacy builds marked with format: 'legacy', active builds sorted first then by last_activity descending. Script uses only stdlib, handles malformed JSON gracefully with stderr warnings, and includes bonus --dry-run option.
